ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., transfer, direct debit, card payment) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "receiver_iban" TEXT /* IBAN of the recipient's account */,
  "receiver_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, received, sent) */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card associated with the transaction (if applicable) */,
  "banking_account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the banking account associated with the transaction */,
  "sender_iban" TEXT /* IBAN of the sender's account */,
  "sender_name" TEXT /* Name of the sender */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "exchange_rate" TEXT /* Exchange rate used for the transaction (if applicable) */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Unique reference number for the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or memo for the transaction */,
  "fee" TEXT /* Fee charged for the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., online, mobile, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_banking_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("banking_account_id") REFERENCES banking_accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "banking_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each banking account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the account */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number of the banking account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., checking, savings) */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Current balance of the account */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the account */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, closed, on hold) */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the account was opened */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the account is registered */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch where the account is managed */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_banking_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the card */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Card number of the card */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of card (e.g., credit, debit) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the card */,
  "card_status" TEXT /* Status of the card (e.g., active, suspended, expired) */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the card was issued */,
  "cvv" TEXT /* CVV code of the card */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the card */,
  "spending_limit" TEXT /* Spending limit for the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, standard) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_time" TEXT /* Time when the account was locked out due to failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., pending, received, sent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., transfer, direct debit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_types" (
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account type */,
  "account_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the account type (e.g., checking, savings) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_types" (
  "card_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card type */,
  "card_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the card type (e.g., credit, debit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the card type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, standard) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction triggering the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., transaction pending, transaction received) */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the notification has been read (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "notification_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the notification was sent (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being audited (if applicable) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action being audited (e.g., login, transaction creation) */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
